title: Launch Your AI Side Project
modules: Why Most Side Projects Die and How Agile Fixes That
Scoping Your Idea: Using AI to Go from Vague to Viable
Sprint Cycles for Solo Builders: Ship in Weeks, Not Months
AI Tools for Every Stage: Research, Build, Test, Repeat
Handling Scope Creep When AI Makes Everything Feel Possible
Getting Real Feedback Fast: Users, Iteration, and Pivots
Turning a Side Project into a Portfolio Piece or Income Stream
Your First Sprint: Plan and Launch Something in 30 Days
synopsis: You've got an idea and a handful of AI tools — but most side projects stall before they get anywhere real. This course teaches you a lightweight agile workflow designed specifically for solo builders and small teams using AI, so you can stop planning and start shipping.
rationale: Young adults are increasingly using AI to build side projects but lack the project management frameworks to take them from idea to completion, leading to high abandonment rates and missed skill-building opportunities.
learning_outcome: After this course, you can run a structured agile sprint using AI tools to take a side project from initial idea to a working, shareable version within 30 days.
source_signals: Ex-GitHub CEO launches a new developer platform for AI agents
